scripts.dev: WEB_PORT=${WEB_PORT:-3001} API_PORT=${API_PORT:-8001} NUXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=${NUXT_PUBLIC_API_URL:-http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8001}} CORS_ORIGINS=${CORS_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:${WEB_PORT:-3001}} concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: cd api && uv run python dev_server.py
scripts.setup: bun install && cd web && bun install && cd ../api && uv sync --extra dev
scripts.test: concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run test:web" "bun run test:api"
scripts.lint: concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run lint:web" "bun run lint:api"
scripts.lint:api: cd api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format:api: cd api && uv run ruff format .
